# External Audience Personas

These personas represent stakeholders outside the Spec Kitty runtime boundary.

## Index

| Persona | Type | Primary Concern | Linked Journeys |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Project Owner](project-owner.md) | `human` | Fast onboarding and clear governance defaults | 001 |
| [External Tech Lead Evaluator](tech-lead-evaluator.md) | `human` | Adoption fit for engineering delivery workflows and quality gates | Architecture 2.x |
| [External Architect Evaluator](architect-evaluator.md) | `human` | Long-term architecture governance fitness and boundary clarity | Architecture 2.x |
| [External Product Manager Evaluator](product-manager-evaluator.md) | `human` | Intent-to-delivery alignment and decision accountability | Architecture 2.x |
